allow: Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.main import app; from app.routers.api import router; from app.seed import build_seed; print\('imports OK'\); l, t = build_seed\(\); print\(f'seed: {len\(l\)} leads, {len\(t\)} trainees'\)")

Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.auth import hash_password, verify_password, create_token, decode_token; from app.deps import get_current_user; from app.routers.auth import router; print\('auth imports OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; routes=[r['path'] for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['paths']]; print\('\\n'.join\(routes\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); [print\(p\) for p in d['paths']]")

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\pierc\\Desktop\\projects\\Radian Training Tracker\\backend\\venv\\Scripts\\uvicorn.exe" -ArgumentList "app.main:app", "--port", "8001" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\pierc\\Desktop\\projects\\Radian Training Tracker\\backend" -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Temp\\backend_out.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Temp\\backend_err.log" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Write-Host "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\backend_err.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 10)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"aaliyah","password":"radian2026"}'; Write-Host "access_token \(first 40 chars\):" $login.access_token.Substring\(0,40\); Write-Host "user:" \($login.user | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\); $tok = $login.access_token; $headers = @{Authorization = "Bearer $tok"}; $me = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/auth/me" -Headers $headers; Write-Host "me:" \($me | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\); $state = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/state" -Headers $headers; Write-Host "state: leads=$\($state.leads.Count\), trainees=$\($state.trainees.Count\)")

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c", "cd `"C:\\Users\\pierc\\Desktop\\projects\\Radian Training Tracker\\frontend`" && npm run dev" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host "Vite PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; $result = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Frontend status: $\($result.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"aaliyah","password":"radian2026"}'; Write-Host "isAdmin:" $login.user.isAdmin; $tok = $login.access_token; $h = @{Authorization="Bearer $tok"}; $users = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/admin/users" -Headers $h; Write-Host "Users:"; $users | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.id\) $\($_.username\) isAdmin=$\($_.isAdmin\)" }; $newU = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/admin/users" -Method POST -Headers $h -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"name":"Test User","username":"testuser","initials":"TU","role":"Training Coordinator","isAdmin":false,"password":"test123"}'; Write-Host "Created: $\($newU.id\) $\($newU.username\)"; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/admin/users/$\($newU.id\)" -Method DELETE -Headers $h; Write-Host "Deleted OK")

PowerShell($devon = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"devon","password":"radian2026"}'; Write-Host "Devon isAdmin:" $devon.user.isAdmin; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/admin/users" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $\($devon.access_token\)"} } catch { Write-Host "Blocked with: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" })
